missions.name: Venusian Acid Reagents
missions.description: Martian foundries need sulfuric compounds for ore processing. Collect atmospheric gas from Venus.

missions.name: Earth Supply Run
missions.description: Pick up a shipment of bioculture starters from Earth's orbital warehouse.

missions.name: Jovian Hydrogen Haul
missions.description: The fusion reactor needs metallic hydrogen from Jupiter. Hazard pay included.
